<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill this in and keep the checklist honest. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `just check` passes locally (lint, format, types, import contracts, deps, tests w/ 100% diff coverage)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] If tool surface changed: contract snapshot regenerated (`just snapshot-update`) and verified against `docs/vendor/usesend/openapi.json`
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ADR) where relevant
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and contain no secrets
